const common_1 = require("@nestjs/common");
const config_1 = require("@nestjs/config");
const document_controller_1 = require("./document.controller");
const document_service_1 = require("./document.service");
const documents_listener_1 = require("./documents.listener");
const services_1 = require("./services");
const services_2 = require("../../common/services");
const notification_module_1 = require("../notification/notification.module");
const operation_log_module_1 = require("../operation-log/operation-log.module");
const export_module_1 = require("../export/export.module");
const department_permission_module_1 = require("../department-permission/department-permission.module");
const role_module_1 = require("../role/role.module");
const statistics_module_1 = require("../statistics/statistics.module");
const statistics_cache_interceptor_1 = require("../../common/interceptors/statistics-cache.interceptor");
const user_permission_module_1 = require("../user-permission/user-permission.module");
const search_module_1 = require("../search/search.module");
const document_cron_service_1 = require("./document-cron.service");
const document_reference_service_1 = require("./services/document-reference.service");
const document_lifecycle_service_1 = require("./document-lifecycle.service");
const document_control_metadata_service_1 = require("./services/document-control-metadata.service");
const record_form_landing_service_1 = require("./services/record-form-landing.service");
const markdown_wikilink_service_1 = require("./services/markdown-wikilink.service");
const document_reference_health_service_1 = require("./services/document-reference-health.service");
const business_document_link_service_1 = require("./services/business-document-link.service");
const document_expiry_service_1 = require("./services/document-expiry.service");
const number_rule_service_1 = require("./services/number-rule.service");
const prisma_module_1 = require("../../prisma/prisma.module");
const model_landing_module_1 = require("../model-landing/model-landing.module");
const unified_approval_module_1 = require("../unified-approval/unified-approval.module");
const approval_callback_registry_1 = require("../unified-approval/approval-callback.registry");
const document_control_constants_1 = require("./constants/document-control.constants");
let DocumentModule = class DocumentModule {
    constructor(callbackRegistry, documentService) {
        this.callbackRegistry = callbackRegistry;
        this.documentService = documentService;
    }
    onModuleInit() {
        this.callbackRegistry.register('document.approvalApproved', async ({ tx, resourceId, actorId }) => {
            await tx.document.update({
                where: { id: resourceId },
                data: {
                    status: document_control_constants_1.CANONICAL_DOCUMENT_STATUS.EFFECTIVE,
                    revisionStatus: 'current',
                    approverId: actorId,
                    approvedAt: new Date(),
                },
            });
            const doc = await tx.document.findUnique({
                where: { id: resourceId },
                select: { id: true, number: true, lineage_key: true, revisionOfId: true },
            });
            if (doc) {
                await this.documentService.supersedePreviousEffectiveRevision(tx, doc);
            }
        });
        this.callbackRegistry.register('document.approvalRejected', async ({ tx, resourceId }) => {
            await tx.document.update({
                where: { id: resourceId },
                data: { status: document_control_constants_1.CANONICAL_DOCUMENT_STATUS.REJECTED },
            });
        });
    }
};
exports.DocumentModule = DocumentModule;
exports.DocumentModule = DocumentModule = __decorate([
    (0, common_1.Module)({
        imports: [config_1.ConfigModule, prisma_module_1.PrismaModule, notification_module_1.NotificationModule, operation_log_module_1.OperationLogModule, export_module_1.ExportModule, department_permission_module_1.DepartmentPermissionModule, role_module_1.RoleModule, statistics_module_1.StatisticsModule, user_permission_module_1.UserPermissionModule, search_module_1.SearchModule, model_landing_module_1.ModelLandingModule, unified_approval_module_1.UnifiedApprovalModule],
        controllers: [document_controller_1.DocumentController],
        providers: [document_service_1.DocumentService, document_cron_service_1.DocumentCronService, document_reference_service_1.DocumentReferenceService, markdown_wikilink_service_1.MarkdownWikilinkService, document_reference_health_service_1.DocumentReferenceHealthService, business_document_link_service_1.BusinessDocumentLinkService, document_expiry_service_1.DocumentExpiryService, document_lifecycle_service_1.DocumentLifecycleService, document_control_metadata_service_1.DocumentControlMetadataService, record_form_landing_service_1.RecordFormLandingService, services_1.FilePreviewService, services_2.StorageService, statistics_cache_interceptor_1.StatisticsCacheInterceptor, documents_listener_1.DocumentsListener, number_rule_service_1.NumberRuleService],
        exports: [document_service_1.DocumentService, document_reference_service_1.DocumentReferenceService, document_lifecycle_service_1.DocumentLifecycleService, document_control_metadata_service_1.DocumentControlMetadataService, business_document_link_service_1.BusinessDocumentLinkService, document_expiry_service_1.DocumentExpiryService],
    }),
    __metadata("design:paramtypes", [approval_callback_registry_1.ApprovalCallbackRegistry,
        document_service_1.DocumentService])
], DocumentModule);
